sections.paragraph:
fem. אַחֲרֹנָה (from אַחַר with the adj. termination ֹון)-

(1) hinder, latter, opposed to former, foremost, רִאשֹׁון, Exo 4:8 Deu 24:3 Gen 33:2, הַיָּם הָאַחֲרֹון “the hinder (i.e. the western) sea,” the Mediterranean, Deu 11:24 34:2 Joe 2:20.

(2) after, later, following, דֹּור אַחֲרֹון “after generation,” Psa 48:14 יֹום אַחֲרֹון “after-time,” Pro 31:25 Isa 30:8. Pl. אַחֲרֹנִים those who come after, posterity, Job 18:20.

(3) last, Neh 8:18 Isa 44:6, “I (God) am the first and I am the last;” Job 19:25. Fem. אַחֲרֹנָה adv. at last, last, Dan 11:29. Also בָּאַחֲרֹנָה Deu 13:10, and לָאַחֲרֹנָה Num 2:31 Ecc 1:11, at last, lastly.
